/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/lbr_fri_idl_test_command_interfaces.dir/test/test_command_interfaces.cpp.o -o lbr_fri_idl_test_command_interfaces  -Wl,-rpath,/home/pablo/Desktop/ros2_dam/simulation/lbr-stack/install/fri_client_sdk/lib:/home/pablo/Desktop/ros2_dam/simulation/lbr-stack/build/lbr_fri_idl:/opt/ros/jazzy/lib gtest/libgtest_main.a gtest/libgtest.a /home/pablo/Desktop/ros2_dam/simulation/lbr-stack/install/fri_client_sdk/lib/libFRIClient.so -pthread liblbr_fri_idl__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.so liblbr_fri_idl__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/jazzy/lib
